decisions.decision: All 4 in-session bug fixes during the 69-03 checkpoint were applied directly as scoped operator-directed fixes (not deferred to gap-closure), matching the 66-07/67-05/68-03 precedent.
decisions.rationale: Each was small, well-understood, and independently re-verified (build + full 269+396 test suite + live browser re-test) before proceeding.

decisions.decision: The EasyMDE submit-sync fix and the 300px->150px height reduction were applied at the shared markdown-editor.js level (app-wide), not scoped to Contact Notes.
decisions.rationale: The underlying gap affects every field using the shared editor -- fixing it once now prevents recurrence when Phase 70 introduces its own fields, or if any existing field's Required flag ever changes.

decisions.decision: Regression gate was satisfied by running the full dotnet test suite (269 unit + 396 integration) rather than mechanically extracting per-phase test file lists from prior VERIFICATION.md files.
decisions.rationale: This is a single-solution .NET test suite (not a monorepo with isolable per-phase subsets) -- dotnet test already runs everything regardless of which phase a test originated in, so it inherently is the regression check.

next_action: Resume /gsd-execute-phase 69 (or run the remaining steps directly): spawn gsd-verifier for verify_phase_goal, then update_roadmap/update_project_md/offer_next. Working tree is clean, all 3 plans + the checkpoint's 4 fix commits are already committed on milestone/v8-markdown-support. No code work remains -- only the phase-completion bookkeeping steps.
context_notes: Phase 69 (Contact Fields) is functionally, visually, and operator-approved complete. All code shipped in Waves 1-2, verified+approved in Wave 3 (69-03), which also caught and fixed 4 real bugs live via browser-driven testing plus operator's own VS/mobile testing: (1) EasyMDE Preview-pane blockquote styling gap, (2) an app-wide EasyMDE-to-textarea silent-submission-failure bug on required fields (real functional bug, fixed at the shared markdown-editor.js level), (3) oversized default editor height, (4) mobile note-heading contrast + note action button layout. Was about to spawn gsd-verifier (Agent tool call) when the user asked to pause -- that Agent call was interrupted/rejected by the user's pause request, not by an error. Nothing is broken; just needs the phase-completion tail to run.
